title: Graph Coloring CSD Sampling Experiment: 3 LLMs × 20 Difficulty Levels × N=50 Responses
summary: Demo notebook for the CSD (Critical Slowing Down) sampling experiment on graph coloring. Loads pre-generated LLM responses from 3 models (GPT-4o-mini, Gemini-2.0-Flash, Gemini-2.0-Flash-Lite) across 20 difficulty levels. Demonstrates the full analysis pipeline: response parsing with multi-strategy coloring extraction, constraint satisfaction evaluation, TF-IDF embedding, CSD indicator computation (variance, dip test, silhouette, bimodality coefficient, Ashman D, disagreement rate), d* capability boundary estimation, scaling exponent fitting, and classifier comparison (CSD vs disagreement-only baseline). Visualizes accuracy degradation and CSD indicators across difficulty levels with 4-panel matplotlib plots. Uses 60 curated examples (1 per model per level) with pre-computed CSD indicators from the full 3000-call experiment.
